entries.title: Prediction Markets Are Attracting Users Who Never Become Traders
entries.summary: Kalshi surpassed $10 billion in weekly notional volume for the first time, the platform confirmed this week. The record came during the FIFA World Cup, and the user data behind it tells a more interesting story than the headline number. entries.title: Japan’s Prediction Markets Are Following the Pachinko Playbook
entries.summary: While global platforms such as Polymarket and Kalshi remain blocked by Japan’s strict gambling laws, prediction markets are quietly taking root through domestic startups. Their model borrows the same workaround that has allowed Japan’s $100 billion pachinko industry to operate for decades.
